name: shop_no_ads
description: A premium NO-ADS badge: a glossy rounded burst shield with the word "ADS" in chunky gold letters crossed by a bold red diagonal slash inside a red prohibition ring. The word "ADS" is the requested text.
prompt_extra: the red slash and ring sit on top of the gold ADS lettering; readable at 64px

variants.name: warm
variants.prompt_extra: slightly warmer, richer gold tones and a touch more ornament

variants.name: clean
variants.prompt_extra: slightly cooler, simpler and more minimal composition
